Safe and secure trading

Your security is our top priority. All transactions are protected by high-level encryption.
We are proud to be fully licensed and regulated. Trade with trust.

Cutting edge platforms

We utilize the best trading platforms to give you the edge in the market.
Get instant access to MT4, Sirix, Web Trader and more.

Open Account
Login

SUPERIOR TRADING EXPERIENCE Financial Planning

CMTRADING provides clients with access to 150+ tradable markets including the top-performing currencies, high-growth stocks and precious metals. Join us and discover a superior trading experience.   

TRADE ON THE GO 

Whether you’re on a business trip, at the office or on a holiday, our tools and apps ensure you can trade anytime, anywhere. Our innovative technologies ensure you never miss a trading opportunity. 

NEXT-GENERATION TRADING TOOLS 

Take your trading experience to the next level and maximize potential returns with the best trading tools available in the industry. Stay up to date with live trading signals or copy the strategies of veteran traders on our Copykat platform! 

What we Offer

CMTrading offers access to more than 150 tradable markets under a safe and regulated platform. Start trading currency pairs, stocks, commodities, and cryptocurrencies! 

View Services 

About Us

We have over 20 years of experience providing expert financial advice for both businesses and individuals. Our Investment Committee brings decades of industry expertise in driving our investment approach, portfolio construction, and allocation advice. The committee ensures our investments are best in class, combining substantiated research with the most effective investing tools available today.

Frequently Asked Questions

I am new to Forex, where do I start?

The first step is to open an account. It is quite simple and takes only a few minutes. All you need to do is to fill out the registration form here and you will have a new CMTrading Account. 

What account types do you offer?

We offer unique accounts to suit the specific requirements of all traders, regardless of experience. Check out our Accounts page and select the best option that suits your trading goals and needs. 

What assets can I trade?

We offer currency pairs, stocks, commodities, indices and cryptocurrencies. Diversify your trading portfolio under our world-class trading platform. 

DOWNLOAD OUR APPS 

Why choose CMTrading

TRUSTED

CMTrading is an award-winning broker. Trade Forex, commodities, stocks, and cryptocurrencies knowing you’re backed by a leading broker.

EXPERIENCED

Established in 2012 and with more than 1,000,000 clients we’ve grown to become a force to be reckoned with in the trading world.

SAFE

We are proud to be a regulated broker since 2012. We provide our clients with a secure trading environment and keep their investment safe.

For expert financial advice you can trust CMTrading

24/5 SUPPORT IN YOUR LANGUAGE 

Need to get in touch? Whether you require assistance during the day or overnight, our multilingual support team is standing by to assist you with any difficulties you may face. Simply submit your details and we’ll be in touch shortly. You can also email us if you would prefer. 

For Businesses: Do you have questions regarding how a broker can help your company? Send us an email and we’ll get in touch shortly, or call us at +44 161 388 3321

Note: Your details are treated as strictly confidential as per our Privacy Policy.

Trusted by more than 1 million clients worldwide, CMTrading is a licensed international brokerage and CFD provider. Clients can utilize CMTrading’s award-winning platform to benefit from opportunities in the global financial markets under a safe and regulated environment

GCMT LTD Trading as CMTRADING, is a Securities Dealer registered in Seychelles with registration number 8425982-1 and authorised by the Financial Services Authority (FSA) with licence number SD070. Registered office: Block B, No. 6, Global Village, Jivan's Complex, Mont Fleuri, Mahe, Seychelles. GCMT SOUTH AFRICA PTY LTD Trading as CMTRADING Registration No. 2013/045335/07 A juristic representative and agent of BLACKSTONE MARKETING PTY LTD Registration No. 2010/010099/07 (FSP No. 38782). Registered office: 14th Floor, Sandton City Office Tower 9, Corner Rivonia Road and 5th Street, Sandton, Johannesburg, 2169, South Africa. GCMT GROUP LTD. Is the holding company of all abovementioned entities, operating in the international capital markets since 2012 throughout the regulated units held hereto General Risk Warning: CFDs are leveraged products. Trading in CFDs carries a high level of risk thus may not be appropriate for all investors. The investment value can both increase and decrease, and the investors may lose all their invested capital. Under no circumstances shall the Company have any liability to any person or entity for any loss or damage in whole or part caused by, resulting from, or relating to any transactions related to CFDs. Risk Disclaimer © 2021. By www.stg-cmtadawulcom-stage.kinsta.cloud
